description: Continue platform closure work from Prompt.md, excluding i18n cleanup and disabled Docs/Help restoration, and finish the remaining business/runtime/UX/a11y tasks.

userStories.title: Persist runtime tool execution records for subagent sessions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need runtime records to store structured tool execution data so deeper runtime drill-down can be rendered reliably after restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime persistence stores structured tool execution entries alongside subagent session records
Gateway/runtime adapters load and save the new execution record shape without breaking existing session restore
Targeted backend or node tests cover persistence and restore of tool execution records
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a route or host API response that returns lineage and subtree data for a selected runtime session

Tests pass
